summary: All required AI assistant names added to the pattern.

implementationReview.approach: Added AI names directly to the regex alternation group in AI_PATTERN_REGEX.

requirements: Add Gemini (including Google Gemini, Gemini Pro)
fulfillmentCheck.notes: Pattern now includes: Factory Droid, factory-droid[bot], Gemini, Google Gemini, Gemini Pro, Perplexity, Perplexity AI, Amazon Q, Amp, Amp AI. All escape special characters properly (e.g., \[ and \] for brackets).

sharedStateObservations.observation: The pattern uses a single combined regex with alternation. As more AI names are added, the regex could become unwieldy.
sharedStateObservations.suggestedAction: Consider documenting the process for adding new AI names to the pattern.
